channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Beef and other meat prices rise ahead of Easter due to ongoing supply shortages
item.description: Canadian shoppers are facing higher costs for their Easter meals in 2026, driven primarily by surging beef prices and increases in pork and chicken. According to the latest consumer price index data, ...

item.title: Important updates in the search for Nancy Guthrie after her disappearance
item.description: The search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, mother of 'Today' show host Savannah Guthrie, has now entered its seventh week. Nancy vanished from her Tucson, Arizona, home on January 31, possibly kidnappe...

item.title: How Blended Capital is Driving Kenya’s Digital Infrastructure and Growth
item.description: Kenya’s digital economy has grown fast over the last ten years, largely thanks to mobile money, fintech, and tech-enabled services in health, education and commerce. But this rapid growth is putting p...

item.title: Raila Odinga sio sasa, kwa nini kiongozi kama yeye wanachomesha
item.description: Katika makala haya, mwandishi analisisi kama vile “ukomeshaji” kwa Raila Odinga umeweka kiongozi kama yeye wanaishawishi siasa ya Kenya kama kabla. Baada ya kumalizika kipengele kikubwa cha kiongozi w...

item.title: Canberra records highest February property listings amid rising interest rates
item.description: Canberra’s property market experienced a remarkable surge in activity in February 2026, according to Domain data, with listing volumes reaching record highs for the month. The Tuggeranong district sto...

item.title: Borno Governor Zulum Alerts Residents on Two Suspected Suicide Bombers Still at Large in Maiduguri Ahead of Eid
item.description: Borno State Governor, Babagana Umara Zulum, don warn residents of Maiduguri to stay very vigilant during Eid prayers because intelligence report say two suicide bombers dey still dey around the city, ...

item.title: Fiancée Concerned About Premarital Challenges Related to Porn Habit
item.description: Vincent, a 37-year-old professional in AI, recently proposed to his fiancée, a born-again Christian. Although she accepted, she asked Vincent if there were any issues that might prevent them from livi...

item.title: Outrage as Women Face Assault and Molestation During Ozoro Community Festival in Delta State
item.description: On Thursday, March 19, 2026, during a traditional festival in Ozoro Kingdom, headquarters of Isoko North Local Government Area in Delta State, several girls and women were reportedly stripped, moleste...

item.title: Udeme Okon and Leendert Koekemoer Team Up as Training Partners to Chase 400m Success
item.description: Udeme Okon and Leendert Koekemoer, two promising South African 400m athletes, have become training partners in addition to being relay teammates, world championship medallists, rivals, and friends. Li...

item.title: Hollywood and Fans Mourn the Death of Chuck Norris at 86
item.description: Chuck Norris, the legendary martial artist and actor known for his roles in 'Walker, Texas Ranger' and countless action films, has died at the age of 86. His family announced his sudden passing just d...

item.title: Iran Escalates Conflict with Longest-Range Attack Yet; Israel Braces for Surge in Strikes
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US and Iran escalated significantly on March 22, 2026, with Iran launching its longest-range missile attack yet, targeting a joint US-UK military base in the Indian Oc...

item.title: Air India Introduces Strict Cabin Crew Health and Fitness Compliance Policy Effective from May 1, 2026
item.description: Air India has rolled out a new 'Cabin Crew Health and Fitness Compliance Policy' that will come into effect from May 1, 2026. This policy applies to all permanent and fixed-term contract cabin crew me...

item.title: Andrew Johns and Brad Fittler discuss Hudson Young's strong case for NSW Blues selection
item.description: Rugby league great Andrew Johns believes Canberra Raiders forward Hudson Young is close to securing a starting role in the New South Wales Blues' back row for the upcoming State of Origin series. Spea...

item.title: PM Modi urges protection of shipping lanes and condemns attacks on critical infrastructure during phone call with Iranian President
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi held his second telephonic conversation with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian since the recent escalation of military hostilities in West Asia. During the call, PM Modi...

item.title: Mombasa: Unidentified woman's body found dumped in unfinished building in Shelly Beach
item.description: Residents of Senti Kumi area in Shelly Beach, Likoni Sub-County, Mombasa, made a shocking discovery when they found the body of an unidentified woman lying in a pile of garbage inside an unfinished bu...

item.title: Rising concerns over ketamine use among children as young as 10 in Manchester
item.description: Ketamine, a Class B drug, is becoming increasingly popular among children as young as 10, according to investigations by Greater Manchester Police. The drug, which is being sold on social media platfo...

item.title: Caravan Tourism Gains Popularity in India with Focus on Maharashtra and Other States
item.description: Caravan tourism is becoming quite popular across India, especially among travellers who want to avoid crowded hotels, fixed schedules, and over-planned trips. Instead, they prefer travelling at their ...

item.title: Local issues overshadow Gandhi influence in Wayanad ahead of Kerala Assembly polls
item.description: The Hindu article examines how Rahul Gandhi and Priyanka Gandhi Vadra have transformed the political landscape of Wayanad, while deep-rooted local concerns continue to define the region’s electoral ch...

item.title: Border Clashes Between Guinea and Sierra Leone Prompt Diplomatic Talks Over Disputed Yenga Area
item.description: On 23 February 2026, soldiers from Guinea and Sierra Leone clashed once again along their shared border in the Faranah region. This incident is part of recurring tensions that stem from colonial-era b...

item.title: Tanzania Reassures Farmers on Fertiliser Supply Despite Middle East Instability
item.description: The Tanzanian government has reassured local farmers that the country has enough fertiliser to meet current and upcoming agricultural needs, despite the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The Tanzan...
